revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:八王子神社]]


[[File:Hachioji Jinjya.JPG|250px|thumb|Hachioji Shrine at Fukazawa Mountain (Hachioji City)]]
'''Hachioji Shrine''' (八王子神社) enshrines the {{ill|lt=Eight Princes (Hachioji Gongen)|Hachioji Gongen|ja|八王子権現|1=Hachiōji Gongen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lt=Eight Princes (Hachioji Gongen)|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Gongen|qq=}} (八柱の御子神) of {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|en|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} (also known as {{ill|Gozu Tennō|en|Gozu Tennō|qid=Q11570247|lt=Gozu Tennō|1=Gozu Tennō}}). It is also referred to as '''Hachioji-miya''' or '''Yahashira Shrine''' (八柱神社), and there are numerous such shrines across Japan.

== Overview ==

Hachioji Shrines originated from the syncretic belief in {{ill|Hachioji Gongen|ja|八王子権現|1=Hachiōji Gongen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Gongen|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Gongen|qq=}} under the system of {{ill|Shinbutsu-shūgō|en|Shinbutsu-shūgō|qid=Q2279088|lt=Shinbutsu-shūgō|1=Shinbutsu-shūgō}}. 

In {{ill|913|en|913|qid=Q24860|lt=913|1=913}}, Buddhist monk Kegon Bosatsu Myōgyō had a vision of Gozu Tennō and eight princes while practicing asceticism at Fukazawa Mountain, currently {{ill|Shiroyama (Hachioji City)|ja|城山 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiroyama (Hachioji City)|1=Mount Shiroyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11426084}} in {{ill|Hachiōji|en|Hachiōji|qid=Q208863|lt=Hachioji City|1=Hachiōji}}, Tokyo. Inspired by this revelation, he enshrined {{ill|Hachioji Gongen|ja|八王子権現|1=Hachiōji Gongen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Gongen|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiōji Gongen|qq=}} at Fukazawa Mountain in {{ill|916|en|916|qid=Q24886|lt=916|1=916}}.

Gozu Tennō, regarded as a Buddhist guardian deity, is believed to have had eight children with {{ill|Hariti|ja|頗梨采女|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hariti|1=Harisai-sho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1654753}}. These children are enshrined as the Hachioji deities.

The eight princes were later associated with eight directions and calendar deities, also known as {{ill|Hasshōshin|ja|八将神|1=Eight Directional Deities|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasshōshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Eight Directional Deities|qq=}}:
* {{ill|Taisai-shin|ja|太歳神|1=Taisaijin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisai-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} (Jupiter, Sōkō Tennō)
* {{ill|Daishōgun|ja|大将軍 (方位神)|1=Daishōgun (directional deity)|lt=Daishōgun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun (directional deity)|qq=}} (Venus, Maō Tennō)
* {{ill|Taion-shin|ja|太陰神|1=Taionjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taion-shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Taionjin|qq=}} (Saturn, Kumara Tennō)
* {{ill|Saigyōshin|ja|歳刑神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saigyōshin|qq=}} (Mercury, Tokutatsu Tennō)
* {{ill|Saiha Shin|ja|歳破神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha Shin|qq=}} (Saturn, Ryōji Tennō)
* {{ill|Saisetsujin|ja|歳殺神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saisetsujin|qq=}} (Mars, Jishin Tennō)
* {{ill|Ōbanjin|ja|黄幡神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōbanjin|qq=}} (Rahu, Takushin Tennō)
* {{ill|Hyōbijin|ja|豹尾神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbijin|qq=}} (Ketu, Jakidokikami Tennō)

During the {{ill|Shinbutsu bunri|en|Shinbutsu bunri|qid=Q1970535|lt=Shinbutsu bunri|1=Shinbutsu bunri}} of the Meiji era, the eight princes were redefined as the {{ill|Five Male and Three Female Deities|ja|五男三女神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Male and Three Female Deities|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマテラスとスサノオの誓約}}, born from the {{ill|Ukei|ja|誓約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ukei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 宣誓|1=Oath|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q381045}} between {{ill|Amaterasu|ja|アマテラス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amaterasu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天照大神}} and Susanoo:
* {{ill|Ame-no-Oshihomimi|ja|正勝吾勝勝速日天之忍穂耳命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Oshihomimi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノオシホミミ|1=Ame-no-oshihomimi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q462555}}
* {{ill|Ame-no-Hohi|ja|天之菩卑能命|1=Ame no Hohi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Hohi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノホヒ}}
* {{ill|Amatsuhikone|ja|天津日子根命|1=Amatsuhikone|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|13=User:Immanuelle/Amatsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アマツヒコネ}}
* {{ill|Ikutsuhikone|ja|活津日子根命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イクツヒコネ|1=Ikutsuhikone|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11147583}}
* {{ill|Kumanokusubi|ja|熊野久須毘命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumanokusubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クマノクスビ}}
* {{ill|Takiribime|ja|多紀理毘売命|1=Tagorihime|2=ja|3=タキリビメ|4=fr|5=Takiribime|6=zh|7=多紀理毘賣命|1=Tagorihime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takiribime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市寸島比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}}
* {{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|多岐都比売命|1=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タギツヒメ}}

Certain shrines enshrine different deities. For example, at {{ill|Yasaka Shrine|en|Yasaka Shrine|qid=Q692714|lt=Yasaka Shrine|1=Yasaka Shrine}}, the eight princes are identified as [[Yashimajinumi]], {{ill|Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|ja|五十猛神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-kami|en:draft|10=fr|11=Isotakeru-no-kami|qid=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru-no-kami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|qq=|1=Isotakeru-no-Mikoto}}, and other deities.

{{ill|11|ja|大将軍八神社|1=Daishōgun Hachi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/11|13=User:Immanuelle/Daishōgun Hachi Shrine|qq=}} identifies the two as such

* {{ill|Taisaijin|ja|太歳神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taisaijin|qq=}} ({{ill|Ame-no-oshihomimi|en|Ame-no-oshihomimi|qid=Q462555|lt=Ame-no-oshihomimi|1=Ame-no-oshihomimi}})
* {{ill|Taionjin|ja|太陰神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taionjin|qq=}} ({{ill|Ichikishima-hime|ja|市杵嶋姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikishima-hime||1=Ichikishima-hime|2=fr|3=Ichikishimahime|4=ja|5=イチキシマヒメ|6=zh|7=市寸島比賣命|8=ru|9=Итикишима-химэ|10=de|11=Ichikishima-hime}})
* {{ill|Saigyōshin|ja|歳刑神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saigyōshin|qq=}} ({{ill|Tagorihime|ja|田心媛命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagorihime|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タキリビメ}})
* {{ill|Saiha Shin|ja|歳破神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saiha Shin|qq=}} ({{ill|Tagitsuhime|ja|湍津姫命|1=Tagitsuhime|2=ja|3=タギツヒメ|4=zh|5=多岐都比賣命|6=fr|7=Tagitsuhime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tagitsuhime|qq=}})
* {{ill|Saisetsujin|ja|歳殺神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saisetsujin|qq=}} ({{ill|Ame no Hohi|ja|天穂日神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame no Hohi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to アメノホヒ}})
* {{ill|Ōbanjin|ja|黄幡神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōbanjin|qq=}} ({{ill|Ikutsuhikone|ja|活津彦根神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikutsuhikone|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to イクツヒコネ|1=Ikutsuhikone|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11147583}})
* {{ill|Hyōbijin|ja|豹尾神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hyōbijin|qq=}} ({{ill|Kumanokusubi|ja|熊野櫲樟日命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kumanokusubi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to クマノクスビ}})

== Other Notable Hachioji Shrines ==
; Kantō Region
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Saitama)|ja|八王子神社 (さいたま市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Saitama)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine|lt=Hachioji Shrine|lt=Hachioji Shrine (Hachioji City)|ja|八王子神社 (八王子市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Hachioji City)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motohachioji Town|ja|元八王子町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motohachioji Town|1=Moto-Hachiōjimachi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11387784}}, Hachioji City, Tokyo (3-2735). Former site of {{ill|Hachiōji Castle|en|Hachiōji Castle|qid=Q2969389|lt=Hachioji Castle|1=Hachiōji Castle}}. Origin of the name "Hachioji City."
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Funabashi)|ja|八王子神社 (船橋市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Funabashi)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Kowagama Town|ja|古和釜町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kowagama Town|1=Kowagamachō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11410982}}, Funabashi City, Chiba Prefecture.
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Chigasaki)|ja|八王子神社 (茅ヶ崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Chigasaki)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Motomura|ja|本村 (茅ヶ崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Motomura|1=Honson|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q121603881}}, Chigasaki City, Kanagawa Prefecture.

; Chūbu Region
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Iida City)|ja|八王子神社 (飯田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Iida City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504531|1=Hachioji Shrine (Iida City)}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Omachi City)|ja|八王子神社 (大町市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Omachi City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504533|1=Hachioji Shrine (Omachi City)}} - Located in Tokiwa, Omachi City, Nagano Prefecture.
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Tatsuno Town, Nagano Prefecture)|ja|八王子神社 (長野県辰野町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Tatsuno Town, Nagano Prefecture)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504535|1=Hachioji Shrine (Tatsuno Town, Nagano Prefecture)}}
* {{ill|Yahashira Shrine (Neba Village, Nagano Prefecture)|ja|八柱神社 (長野県根羽村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yahashira Shrine (Neba Village, Nagano Prefecture)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504537|1=Yahashira Shrine (Neba Village, Nagano Prefecture)}} - Located in Mambase, Neba Village, Shimoina District, Nagano Prefecture.
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Ena City)|ja|八王子神社 (恵那市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Ena City)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Iwata City)|ja|八王子神社 (磐田市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Iwata City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504539|1=Hachioji Shrine (Iwata City)}}
* {{ill|Yahashira Shrine (Hamamatsu City)|ja|八柱神社 (浜松市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yahashira Shrine (Hamamatsu City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504540|1=Yahashira Shrine (Hamamatsu City)}} - Located in Irino Town, Nishi Ward, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture.
* {{ill|Yahashira Shrine (Okazaki City)|ja|八柱神社 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yahashira Shrine (Okazaki City)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Kariya City)|ja|八王子神社 (刈谷市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Kariya City)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yahashira Shrine (Hekinan)|ja|八柱神社 (碧南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yahashira Shrine (Hekinan City)|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yahashira Shrine (Toei Town, Aichi Prefecture)|ja|八柱神社 (愛知県東栄町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yahashira Shrine (Toei Town, Aichi Prefecture)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504542|1=Yahashira Shrine (Toei Town, Aichi Prefecture)}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Minamichita Town)|ja|八王子社 (南知多町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Minamichita Town)|qq=}}

; Kinki Region
* {{ill|Yahashira Shrine (Taiki Town)|ja|八柱神社 (大紀町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yahashira Shrine (Taiki Town)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504544|1=Yahashira Shrine (Taiki Town)}} - Located in Ouchiyama 1138, Taiki Town, Watarai District, Mie Prefecture.
* {{ill|Yahashira Shrine (Nara City)|ja|八柱神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yahashira Shrine (Nara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504546|1=Yahashira Shrine (Nara City)}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Nara)|ja|八王子社 (奈良市納院町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Nara)|qq=}} - Located in Noincho, Nara City, Nara Prefecture. Enshrines {{ill|Oyamakui no Kami|en|Oyamakui no Kami|qid=Q10935105|lt=Oyamakui-no-Kami|1=Oyamakui no Kami}}.
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Kashihara City)|ja|八王子神社（橿原市）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Kashihara City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504549|1=Hachioji Shrine (Kashihara City)}} - Located at 336 Koyocho, Kashihara City, Nara Prefecture. Situated on the southern foothills of Ibe Mountain in southwestern Kashihara City.
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Kasai City)|ja|八王子神社 (加西市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Kasai City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504550|1=Hachioji Shrine (Kasai City)}} - Located in Taya Town, Kasai City, Hyōgo Prefecture.
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Osaka)|ja|八王子神社 (大阪市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Osaka City)|qid=Q135504552|1=Hachioji Shrine (Osaka)}} - Located in Nakamoto 4-chome, Higashinari Ward, Osaka City, Osaka Prefecture.
* {{ill|Tokoyoki-hime Shrine|ja|常世岐姫神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tokoyoki-hime Shrine|qq=}} - Located in Jinguji 5-chome, Yao City, Osaka Prefecture. Formerly known as Hachioji Shrine.

; Shikoku Region
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Muroto City)|ja|八王子宮 (室戸市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Muroto City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504554|1=Hachioji Shrine (Muroto City)}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Kami City)|ja|八王子宮 (香美市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Kami City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504556|1=Hachioji Shrine (Kami City)}}
* {{ill|Hachioji Shrine (Tosa-Yamada Town, Kochi Prefecture)|ja|八王子宮 (高知県土佐山田町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachioji Shrine (Tosa-Yamada Town, Kochi Prefecture)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135504557|1=Hachioji Shrine (Tosa-Yamada Town, Kochi Prefecture)}}

== Origin of Hachioji City ==
The name "Hachioji City" originated during the Sengoku period when {{ill|Hōjō Ujiteru|en|Hōjō Ujiteru|qid=Q2790462|lt=Hōjō Ujiteru|1=Hōjō Ujiteru}} named his castle {{ill|Hachiōji Castle|en|Hachiōji Castle|qid=Q2969389|lt=Hachioji Castle|1=Hachiōji Castle}} after the legends of the eight princes.


== See Also ==
* {{ill|Ōji-no-Kami|ja|王子神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōji-no-Kami|qq=}}
* {{ill|Hachi Shrine|ja|八神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachi Shrine|qq=}}
* {{ill|Gion cult|en|Gion cult|qid=Q11588425|lt=Gion Faith|1=Gion Faith}}
